description: No dedicated protocols/websocket_handler.py file exists. WebSocket handling is embedded inside http_handler.py:_handle_websocket_request (lines 216-227) as an ASGI sub-handler only. ProtocolType.WEBSOCKET and ProtocolErrorMapper._to_websocket() already exist, but there is no standalone handler class. Cannot use WebSocket as an independent protocol; depends on HTTP handler for lifecycle.
proposed_solution: Create WebSocketProtocolHandler as a standalone handler in protocols/websocket_handler.py; extract WS logic from http_handler; support text/binary frames, ping/pong, close codes; register in __init__.py.

description: No factory.py exists in the protocols/ package. Handler construction logic lives in src/wiring/factories/protocol_provider.py (build_protocol_handler), breaking encapsulation. Adding a new handler requires modifying two separate locations: the handler file and the wiring factory file.
proposed_solution: Move build_protocol_handler logic from wiring/factories/protocol_provider.py to protocols/factory.py; re-export via __init__.py; make protocol_provider.py delegate to protocols.factory.build_protocol_handler.
